body:
Title: Revenu Quebec Schedule A 2025 amount for dependants and amount transferred by a child.

Source:
- https://www.revenuquebec.ca/en/online-services/forms-and-publications/current-details/tp-1-v/
- https://www.revenuquebec.ca/documents/en/formulaires/tp/2025-12/TP-1.D.A-V%282025-12%29.pdf

Schedule A numeric source values for encoded amounts, thresholds, caps, and limits:
Value: 7646
Value: 5570

Schedule A calculates amounts transferred to the Quebec TP-1 income tax return. For a child under 18 enrolled in post-secondary studies, line 10 uses the amount from RL-8 slip box A and caps it at $7,646 for each child. Lines 12 through 20 calculate income used to reduce that amount by starting with the child's net income on line 275, adding the deduction on line 236, and subtracting scholarships, bursaries and similar allowances included on line 154. Line 21 subtracts the income reduction from the capped line 10 amount and floors the result at zero. Line 22 adds the resulting amounts for children under 18, including any attached-sheet amounts.

For children 18 or over, Schedule A line 29 adds the amounts transferred by eligible children from Schedule S. For other dependants, line 43 gives a basic amount of $5,570. Lines 44 through 53 calculate the dependant's income for reduction using net income, line 236 deductions, and scholarships or similar amounts included on line 154. Lines 54 and 55 subtract the reduction for months after the dependant turned 18 and the income reduction, flooring the result at zero. Line 56 adds the amounts for other dependants, including attached-sheet amounts. Schedule A line 367 adds lines 22, 29, and 56 for transfer to TP-1 line 367. Line 70 adds Schedule T line 68 amounts transferred by children for transfer to TP-1 line 398.1.
